summary: Plan-only classification completed from the hydrated preflight artifact. #88488 remains the canonical open bug report for Android/device-backed node removal. #90373 is an open contributor PR that appears to address the same root cause, but merge/fix actions are blocked by job frontmatter and the PR still needs maintainer review for compatibility/authz/data-model risk, so it is kept related rather than recommended for merge or closeout.

actions.reason: #88488 is the best surviving canonical issue for the root cause and remains open for maintainer tracking.
#90373 is the live contributor fix candidate for #88488, but it is not closable or mergeable through this plan job because merge/fix actions are blocked and maintainer review is still required.
